channel.title: Chemical Product and Process Modeling
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Chemical Product and Process Modeling

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Baohua Shen, Xiaoman Lu, Juan Jiang, Daoguo Li DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/cppm-2024-frontmatter6

item.title: Comparative study of deterministic and stochastic optimization algorithms applied to the absorption of CO2 by alkanolamine solution
item.description: Article by Baohua Shen, Xiaoman Lu, Juan Jiang, Daoguo Li DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/cppm-2024-0045

item.title: Modeling the kinetics, energy consumption and shrinkage of avocado pear pulp during drying in a microwave assisted dryer
item.description: Article by Baohua Shen, Xiaoman Lu, Juan Jiang, Daoguo Li DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/cppm-2024-0062

item.title: Study of municipal solid waste treatment using plasma gasification by application of Aspen Plus
item.description: Article by Baohua Shen, Xiaoman Lu, Juan Jiang, Daoguo Li DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/cppm-2024-0053

item.title: Numerical analysis of segregation of microcrystalline cellulose powders from a flat bottom silo with various orifice positions
item.description: Article by Baohua Shen, Xiaoman Lu, Juan Jiang, Daoguo Li DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/cppm-2024-0039

item.title: Prediction of syngas production in the gasification process of biomass employing adaptive neuro-fuzzy inference system along with meta-heuristic algorithms
item.description: Article by Baohua Shen, Xiaoman Lu, Juan Jiang, Daoguo Li DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/cppm-2024-0043

item.title: Industrial high saline water desalination by activated carbon in a packed column- an experimental and CFD study
item.description: Article by Baohua Shen, Xiaoman Lu, Juan Jiang, Daoguo Li DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/cppm-2024-0069

item.title: Dual-loop PID control strategy for ramp tracking and ramp disturbance handling for unstable CSTRs
item.description: Article by Baohua Shen, Xiaoman Lu, Juan Jiang, Daoguo Li DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/cppm-2024-0081

item.title: A control perspective on hybrid membrane/distillation propane/propylene separation process
item.description: Article by Baohua Shen, Xiaoman Lu, Juan Jiang, Daoguo Li DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/cppm-2024-0032

item.title: Prediction of surface heating effect on non-equilibrium homogeneous condensation in supersonic nozzle using CFD method
item.description: Article by Baohua Shen, Xiaoman Lu, Juan Jiang, Daoguo Li DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/cppm-2024-0061

item.title: Modeling the emitted carbon dioxide and monoxide gases in the gasification process using optimized hybrid machine learning models
item.description: Article by Baohua Shen, Xiaoman Lu, Juan Jiang, Daoguo Li DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/cppm-2024-0040
